author: bharath.vedartham
content: Is there a way to get the beacon state for slot 6524? I tried to query a beacon node but i think the state has been pruned

author: tbenr
content: there were several forks at that time. so probably there were multiple states at 6524 with different `latest_block_hash`

author: tbenr
content:
probably complicated to get the state back.
But to detect that something went you don't need it. 

it is very weird that the block hash of the payload matches `0x9a0ed6fed73fd95983ef5d15fb34dd4e43f2ce390bf0f8a2c383d5d4218181c2`

but they have different `parent_hash`
